steps.title: Introduce the artist broadly
steps.content: An unfamiliar audience needs basic identifying information: Kahlo's importance, nationality, profession, and what she is best known for. Details about one painting are less useful for an introduction.

steps.title: Choose the overview sentence
steps.content: A and B focus on The Two Fridas, and C describes one painting without establishing Kahlo's broader significance. The overview identifying her as an influential Mexican painter known for vivid, symbolic self-portraits best fits the goal. The answer is D.
